2026-04-15T22:26:41.9480071Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9480504Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9480832Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9481118Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9481365Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9481558Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9481841Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9481993Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9482129Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9482314Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9482478Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9482701Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-15T22:26:41.9482904Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-15T22:28:30.8554215Z 
2026-04-15T22:28:35.7634443Z Now I have a clear picture. The README is significantly outdated relative to what was added. The package now has:
2026-04-15T22:28:36.8103644Z - `ConversationAdministrationClient` — new Unified Messaging client (not documented)
2026-04-15T22:28:36.8107311Z - `ConversationThreadClient` — new conversation thread client (not documented)  
2026-04-15T22:28:36.8108919Z - `ConversationThreadClientSettings` — new settings type (not documented)
2026-04-15T22:28:36.8109943Z 
2026-04-15T22:28:39.1321702Z The README only documents WhatsApp-specific `NotificationMessagesClient`/`MessageTemplateClient`, missing entirely the Unified Messaging APIs added in 1.3.0-beta.1 and 1.3.0-beta.2. The CHANGELOG 1.3.0-beta.3 unreleased section is empty despite the migration and new types landing in this push.
2026-04-15T22:28:39.1323098Z 
2026-04-15T22:29:15.6910285Z Also the README structure is missing proper **Key concepts** as a standalone H2 section, uses a collapsed `### Key concepts` inline under Getting started, and doesn't document the `CommunicationTokenCredential` authentication path that was custom-suppressed in this migration.
2026-04-15T22:29:15.6911818Z

2026-04-15T22:29:25.5451904Z **Summary of gaps found:**
2026-04-15T22:29:26.7275678Z - The README only covers legacy WhatsApp notification APIs; `ConversationAdministrationClient` and `ConversationThreadClient` (Unified Messaging) are completely absent
2026-04-15T22:29:26.7276901Z - `ConversationThreadClientSettings` (new custom type from this PR) is undocumented
